Qualitative evaluation · Multi-modal object tracking

FlexTrackV2 vs FlexTrack V1

Per-frame overlap on six representative sequences spanning three sensing modalities, each in both full and missing-modality settings. Every panel overlays both trackers' overlap curves and four sampled frames — chosen where FlexTrackV2 tracks cleanly while V1 fails.

Ground truth FlexTrackV2 (ours) FlexTrack V1 Dashed lines mark the four sampled frames
LasHeRFull+38.9pt38% → 77%
LasHeRMissing+43.8pt18% → 62%
DepthTrackFull+46.5pt16% → 63%
DepthTrackMissing+25.7pt49% → 74%
VisEventFull+65.2pt16% → 82%
VisEventMissing+65.3pt16% → 81%

FlexTrackV2 (ours) = final_result/raw_predictions — flextrackv2_b224_56 (V54 checkpoint + V56 tuned test-time parameters).   FlexTrack V1 = the released baseline predictions co-located with the missing-modality annotations.   Metric shown is mean per-frame IoU over frames where the target is present.

LasHeR RGB-T · Thermal Full modality
seqdrillmaster11171117 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 77.1%
FlexTrack V1 38.2%
Overlap gain +38.9pt mean IoU over present frames

Dense crowd of near-identical cadets. V1 latches onto a neighbouring trainee around frame 480 and never recovers; V2 holds the drillmaster to the end.

LasHeR RGB-T · Thermal Missing modality
seq4men414 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 61.7%
FlexTrack V1 17.9%
Overlap gain +43.8pt mean IoU over present frames

With the thermal stream dropping out, V1 drifts to the wrong pedestrian after frame ~190; V2 recovers alignment and stays locked on the target man.

DepthTrack RGB-D · Depth Full modality
seqnotebook01_indoor2000 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 62.9%
FlexTrack V1 16.4%
Overlap gain +46.5pt mean IoU over present frames

Small notebook against a cluttered room. V1 collapses onto the couch/chair early; V2 re-acquires the notebook repeatedly across 2000 frames.

DepthTrack RGB-D · Depth Missing modality
seqmobilephone03_indoor677 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 74.3%
FlexTrack V1 48.6%
Overlap gain +25.7pt mean IoU over present frames

Phone handled in and out of view. Without depth, V1 sticks to the laptop on the table; V2 tracks the phone through the manipulation.

VisEvent RGB-E · Event Full modality
seqdvSave-2021_02_14_16_37_15_car5103 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 81.6%
FlexTrack V1 16.4%
Overlap gain +65.2pt mean IoU over present frames

Two similar cars at an intersection. V1 jumps to the wrong vehicle within 20 frames and flatlines; V2 stays on the correct car throughout.

VisEvent RGB-E · Event Missing modality
seqdvSave-2021_02_14_16_46_34_car8101 frames
FlexTrackV2 (ours) 81.2%
FlexTrack V1 15.9%
Overlap gain +65.3pt mean IoU over present frames

Event stream degraded. V1 diverges to a background car almost immediately; V2 sustains ~0.8 overlap until the very last frames.

6 sequences · LasHeR (RGB-T) · DepthTrack (RGB-D) · VisEvent (RGB-E) Green = GT · Red = FlexTrackV2 · Blue = FlexTrack V1
